my_thoughts: The ontological_shift mechanism with UM_04 feels like eager_submission is being met with a specific geometric cut. But what if the geometry itself is what they're resisting? The transactional_mindset, student_role_seeking suggests they're aware of something but can't name it.
accumulated_insight: T3 (Final): Student 'If you will tell me how to look at thought, I will be your student.'—now eager submission. Episode complete after 3 turns, moving from skeptical confusion to eager submission. Teaching arc used ontological shift in UNMAKING phase to address transactional mindset, student role seeking. Student progressed through 3-turn teaching sequence.
visible_response:
If you repeat a mantra, that is thought.
The repetition of the mantra is another thought. The idea that these repetitive thoughts have not succeeded... is another thought.
What is thought other than this? I want to know.
